name: Veilharbor Archive
footer: The Veilharbor Archive is the example wiki that ships with the Bibliotheca Dantalian engine. Lanternfall, its author, and everything described here are fictional, invented for this demonstration.
Wiki text is available under CC BY-SA 4.0. Site code is MIT licensed. [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/exekyute/exekyute-daily-builds/tree/main/miscellaneous-projects/bibliotheca-dantalian)
